ksa_text: Skill in conducting AI conformity assessments under the EU AI Act, including risk classification determination, technical documentation evaluation, and compliance assessment against applicable high-risk AI system requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-S-008 (Risk and Compliance/Skill) scores 0.600 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.600) and is edge_case for the Data Classification Specialist role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 1. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for specialist-level Data Classification Specialist.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, EU AI Act signal (0.600), and Risk and Compliance handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis confirms Risk and Compliance competencies at composite 0.600 are consistent with Data Classification Specialist hiring criteria.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Market evidence supports this competency for Data Classification Specialist. Final decision: include.
